name: feishu-docs-manager
description: Codex plugin for downloading, exporting, listing, and troubleshooting Feishu/Lark Drive documents and folders with official lark-cli.

interface.longDescription: Download, export, list, and troubleshoot Feishu/Lark Drive documents, sheets, files, and folders using the official lark-cli OAuth/device-code workflow. Includes reusable guidance for permissions, admin approval loops, and batch folder export.
defaultPrompt: Download this Feishu folder to local files.
Export these Feishu docs as PDFs.
